faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in New Springville?
faqs.answer: New Springville homes typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. Our technicians are trained to identify and treat all spider species common to Staten Island, using targeted methods that address your specific infestation.
